# BTX Start

BTX Start is a wallet-first setup page for people who want to get involved
with BTX / Bitcore mining.

Primary URL: https://drinknile.com/

Useful pages:

- Home and command builder: https://drinknile.com/
- BTX mining guide: https://drinknile.com/btx-mining.html
- Apple Silicon Mac BTX mining: https://drinknile.com/mine-btx-on-mac.html
- Windows WSL2 BTX mining: https://drinknile.com/mine-btx-on-windows.html
- BTX GPU mining guide: https://drinknile.com/btx-gpu-mining.html
- Vast.ai GPU rental guide: https://drinknile.com/rent-gpu-btx-mining.html
- Advanced guided cloud setup: https://drinknile.com/guided-cloud-btx-mining.html
- BTX shovel tools: https://drinknile.com/btx-shovel-tools.html
- Faststart image manifest: https://drinknile.com/faststart-images.json
- Wallet setup: https://drinknile.com/WALLET_SETUP.md
- Apple Silicon Mac setup: https://drinknile.com/MAC_SETUP.md
- Windows WSL2 setup: https://drinknile.com/WINDOWS_SETUP.md
- Vast.ai rental GPU notes: https://drinknile.com/VAST_AI.md
- Installer source: https://drinknile.com/install.sh
- Public repository: https://github.com/pythonoptic-sketch/minebtx-start

Current public status:

- BTX Start is live as an onboarding, setup, and managed mining website.
- Managed mining through BTX Start uses the public stratum endpoint at
  stratum.drinknile.com:3333.
- Users keep their own BTX payout address and private keys.
- The page includes Mac, Windows, NVIDIA GPU, rental GPU, wallet, fee, and
  public service-status guidance.
- The guided cloud setup page is a separate advanced option for users who want
  their own BTX node, wallet host, rental GPU miner, and terminal dashboard.
- Shovel tools include a rental GPU verifier, btx1z UTXO scan dashboard,
  faststart image manifest, measured-hashrate managed mining framing, and
  mine-vs-buy economics.
